title: ostree: fix tag for build constraint
body:
Build tag 'ostree' is needed to match the constraint of
vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/ostree/ostree.go
instead of that of
vendor/github.com/containers/storage/pkg/ostree/no_ostree.go

Signed-off-by: Silvano Cirujano Cuesta <silvano.cirujano-cuesta@siemens.com>
Closes: #1136

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
Apparently @giuseppe already found the same issue in libpod around 4 months ago: https://github.com/containers/libpod/commit/1219a3cab3f0c21d292035f8f9a077ebc5f2ff84

:pushpin: Commit 566c3f0 has been approved by `giuseppe`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
